items.html: OpenAI's Atlas browser sunsets by August 9 — agentic browsing moves to ChatGPT desktop and Chrome, so migrate any workflows now.
Kyutai released MuScriptor, a free open-weight music-to-MIDI transcription model trained on 170k recordings that handles full multi-instrument mixes.
OpenAI faces sanctions threat for allegedly hiding and deleting ChatGPT logs sought as evidence in the New York Times copyright lawsuit.
Godot's open-source Road Generator plugin now handles procedural intersection lanes with customizable geometry, collision meshes, and AI pathfinding.
OpenAI's new GPT-5.6 Sol tier is 54% more token-efficient for coding — three model variants now available across enterprise and consumer tiers.
Artist Leteramma used Blender geometry nodes to turn hand-drawn pencil sketches into a navigable 3D animated world — paper remapped as emission.

brief.title: Monday, July 13 — six things creators need to know

tooldrop.name: MuScriptor
tooldrop.blurb: Open-weight model from Kyutai that transcribes multi-instrument audio recordings into MIDI. Useful for musicians who want to extract notation or stems from existing tracks.

stories.title: Apple's scrapped self-driving car seeded Neural Engine AI chip architecture
stories.dek: Failed autonomous vehicle project led to development of on-device AI processing capabilities that became core to Apple Silicon's performance.

stories.title: 25 best James Webb Space Telescope photos in four-year retrospective
stories.dek: Curated collection of high-resolution astronomical imagery. Reference resource for photographers seeking inspirational compositions and lighting.

stories.title: Hasselblad XPan editorial shoot demonstrates panoramic film storytelling
stories.dek: Sports photographer Maud shot on XPan to tell a running narrative in few frames. Deliberate constraint-based technique with clear conceptual intent.

stories.title: Photographer prioritizes intention over reaction in mountain and personal work
stories.dek: Decades-long practice rethinking deliberate vision versus documentation reflex. Philosophical framework applicable across mediums.

stories.title: Fantasy artist shares digital painting workflow: Photoshop and Blender fundamentals
stories.dek: Pierre Ignaszewski walks through composition, value, and layering techniques for character work. Practical breakdown of separating figures and managing detail hierarchy.

stories.title: ASUS ProArt PZ14 Windows tablet for digital artists reviewed
stories.dek: Two-in-one drawing device with tradeoffs. Hardware review relevant to creators evaluating tablets; mixed verdict noted.
